perturbation.original_text: I hereby acknowledge and agree that all information pertaining to the professional practice(s) that I am introduced to by ROI Corporation shall be obtained exclusively through ROI Corporation and that I WILL NOT CONTACT THE OWNER(s), STAFF, PATIENTS or other advi sors of the practice(s), unless I am ACCOMPANIED BY AN ASSOCIATE OF ROI CORPORATION.
perturbation.changed_text: I hereby acknowledge and agree that all information pertaining to the professional practice(s) that I am introduced to by ROI Corporation shall be obtained exclusively through ROI Corporation, unless otherwise agreed in writing by the Vendor. Contact with the OWNER(s), STAFF, PATIENTS or other advisors of the practice(s) is permitted without an associate of ROI Corporation if prior written consent is obtained from the Vendor.
perturbation.explanation: The modification allows direct contact with the owner, staff or patients of the professional practice, given that they get prior consent from the vendor in writing. This directly contradicts the original text where it states that ALL information must be obtained through ROI Corporation and contact with them is forbidden unless accompanied by ROI Corporation, leading to disputes over the Receiving Party's ability to gather information independently.
perturbation.contradicted_text: I hereby acknowledge and agree that all information pertaining to the professional practice(s) that I am introduced to by ROI Corporation shall be obtained exclusively through ROI Corporation, unless otherwise agreed in writing by the Vendor. Contact with the OWNER(s), STAFF, PATIENTS or other advisors of the practice(s) is permitted without an associate of ROI Corporation if prior written consent is obtained from the Vendor. I further agree n ot to write or mark the Appraisal(s), nor shall I c opy or reproduce any information in any manner whatsoever without the prior consent of ROI Corporation.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a condition (prior written consent from the vendor) under which direct contact with the owner, staff, or patients is permitted, which contradicts the original agreement that all information must be obtained exclusively through ROI Corporation. The contradicted text is the same as the changed text, but it is the introduction of the 'unless otherwise agreed in writing by the Vendor' clause that creates the contradiction with the initial statement requiring all information to be obtained through ROI Corporation, and the allowance of contact without ROI Corporation's presence.

perturbation.original_text: I further agree n ot to write or mark the Appraisal(s), nor shall I c opy or reproduce any information in any manner whatsoever without the prior consent of ROI Corporation. Initial Here
perturbation.changed_text: I further agree not to alter the Appraisal(s) in any significant way that would change its conclusions or values. Copying and reproduction of the information is permitted for internal review purposes only, without the need for prior consent of ROI Corporation. Initial Here
perturbation.explanation: The change now permits copying and reproducing the information for internal review purposes. This directly contradicts the original agreement, which explicitly states that no information can be copied or reproduced in any manner without prior consent of ROI Corporation. This internal contradiction creates confusion over how appraisals can be internally handled.
perturbation.contradicted_text: I further agree not to alter the Appraisal(s) in any significant way that would change its conclusions or values. Copying and reproduction of the information is permitted for internal review purposes only, without the need for prior consent of ROI Corporation. Initial Here The Receiving Party shall take all practical steps to keep the Disclosing Party’s Confidential Informa tion confidential and shall restrict access to the Confidential Infor mation to those agents and professional advisers to whom disclosure is necessary in pursuit of the Approved Purpose.
perturbation.justification: The original text prohibited any copying or reproduction of appraisal information without prior consent. The changed text now permits copying and reproduction for internal review, explicitly waiving the need for prior consent. This creates a direct contradiction as to whether copying/reproduction is allowed without consent, leading to confusion. The contradicted text is the same as the changed text, which shows that the contradiction is between the earlier and later parts of the contract caused by the modification.
